---
title: 'Preregistration: The interplay between linguistic and embodied systems in conceptual processing'
date: '2021-01-05'
slug: the-interplay-between-linguistic-and-embodied-systems-in-conceptual-processing
categories: 
  - conceptual processing
  - Individual differences
  - psycholinguistics
tags:
  - conceptual processing
  - word recognition
  - semantic decision
  - linguistic distributional knowledge
  - embodied cognition
  - statistics
  - linear mixed-effects models
  - R
  - preregistration
authors: ['**Bernabeu, P.**, Lynott, D., & Connell, L.']
author: ~
doi: 10.17605/OSF.IO/NP6HY
publishDate: '2021-01-05T09:10:27Z'
publication_types:
  - '3'
preregistered: false
open_materials: false
open_data: false
publication: OSF
publication_short: ''
abstract: 'This preregistration outlines a study that will investigate the dynamic nature of conceptual processing by examining the interplay between linguistic distributional systems—comprising word co-occurrence and word association—and embodied systems—comprising sensorimotor and emotional information. A set of confirmatory research questions are addressed using data from the Calgary Semantic Decision project, along with additional measures for the stimuli corresponding to distributional language statistics, embodied information, and individual differences in vocabulary size.'
summary: 'This preregistration outlines a study that will investigate the dynamic nature of conceptual processing by examining the interplay between linguistic distributional systems—comprising word co-occurrence and word association—and embodied systems—comprising sensorimotor and emotional information. A set of confirmatory research questions are addressed using data from the Calgary Semantic Decision project, along with additional measures for the stimuli corresponding to distributional language statistics, embodied information, and individual differences in vocabulary size.'
featured: no
diagram: true
url_fulltext: https://osf.io/ftydw/
url_code: ~
url_data: ~
url_poster: ~
url_project: ~
url_slides: ~
url_source: ~
url_video: ~
image:
  caption: ''
  focal_point: ''
  preview_only: no
projects: []
slides: ''
---


### Study at a glance

```{=html}
<div class="mermaid">
graph TD
  A["Conceptual processing"] --> B["Linguistic distributional systems"]
  A --> C["Embodied systems"]
  B --> D["Word co-occurrence"]
  B --> E["Word association"]
  C --> F["Sensorimotor information"]
  C --> G["Emotional information"]
  H["Calgary Semantic Decision project data"] --> I["Confirmatory research questions"]
  J["Individual differences in vocabulary size"] --> I
  A --> I
</div>
```

*Schematic overview; see the text for details.*


### Reference

Bernabeu, P., Lynott, D., & Connell, L. (2021). *Preregistration: The interplay between linguistic and embodied systems in conceptual processing*. OSF. https://osf.io/ftydw


### Related podcast

<i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles" style='color:darkgrey;'></i> <span style='color:darkgrey; font-style:italic; font-size:85%;'>Created using NotebookLM, with all the benefits and blind spots of human editing.</span>

<iframe allow="autoplay *; encrypted-media *; fullscreen *; clipboard-write" frameborder="0" height="175" style="width:100%;max-width:720px;overflow:hidden;border-radius:10px;" sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-storage-access-by-user-activation allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation" src="https://embed.podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/behind-the-curtains-methods-used-to-investigate/id1837010092?i=1000725594999"></iframe>
